INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Thu, 12 Feb 2026 10:34:31 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 125 | Critical: 32 | High: 17 | Medium: 8 | Low: 68

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Indonesia’s president to attend ‘Board of Peace’ meeting in US (Middle East Eye)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Gaza : Palestinians living along the  Yellow Line  endure daily Israeli attacks (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Epstein Files: Analysts question muted 'mainstream media' response to Israel ties (Middle East Eye)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Kosovo parliament backs Albin Kurti-led government ending deadlock (Al Jazeera)
  [GLOBAL] Police identify 18-year-old as suspect in Tumbler Ridge shooting (BBC World)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (49 events, 14 critical, 7 high):
    - Indonesia’s president to attend ‘Board of Peace’ meeting in US
    - Gaza : Palestinians living along the  Yellow Line  endure daily Israeli attacks
    - Epstein Files: Analysts question muted 'mainstream media' response to Israel ties
  Ukraine/Russia (3 events, 2 critical):
    - Russian strike kills 3 Ukrainian toddlers and father, with pregnant mother injured
    - Ukrainian slider wears helmet despite IOC ban
  Europe (19 events, 6 critical, 5 high):
    - Six dead in suspected murder-suicides in Bulgarian mountains, officials say
    - ‘Under destruction’? US tensions with NATO allies to take center stage at Munich conference
    - German startup aims to deliver European hypersonic strike by 2029
  Indo-Pacific (12 events, 1 critical, 1 high):
    - 'We are treated as outcasts': Acid attack survivor fights for justice and dignity
    - China's Xi Jinping makes rare reference to recent military purge
  United States (2 events, 1 critical):
    - Alleged drones in El Paso airspace cast spotlight on Mexican cartels’ growing arsenals
  Global (40 events, 8 critical, 4 high):
    - Police identify 18-year-old as suspect in Tumbler Ridge shooting
    - Canadian police identify suspect in school massacre that left nine dead
    - Tumbler Ridge school shooting: police identify suspect in Canada attack as 18-year-old local resident – as it happened

Sources: Middle East Eye, GDELT, Al Jazeera, BBC World, The Guardian, BBC Europe, NYT World, Breaking Defense, BBC Asia, Defense News, BBC Middle East
